---
title: " Morgane Henry"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Morgane-Henry-2?ev=hdr_xprf 
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/morgane-henry-bio
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:morgane.henry2@mail.mcgill.ca
---

I am a PhD candidate in quantitative ecology at McGill University. My research focuses on population dynamics, spatial processes, and outbreak ecology.
